title: 实现一级菜单顺序模型与持久化存储
summary: 完成 US-008：为一级菜单顺序补齐显式的数据模型与工作区持久化 seam。当前实现使用稳定的 submenu target 作为一级菜单标识，通过 harness-runner.rootMenuOrder 设置恢复根菜单顺序，并新增对 .vscode/settings.json 写盘与配置重载恢复的回归测试。
architectureNotes: Multiple modules changed; confirm each edit belongs to a single responsibility and document reuse opportunities.

tests.command: 2026-04-05: npm test -> relevant root-menu persistence tests passed; suite still has 2 known unrelated failures in project-constraints title wording and story-evidence approval-state assertions.

riskReasons: The story risk was inferred from the available completion evidence.
releaseNotes: Completed scope: 实现一级菜单顺序模型与持久化存储.
rollbackHints: Review and revert these paths together if rollback is needed: rc/extension.ts, rc/test/extension.test.ts.
Use the story-scoped commit as the primary rollback unit before considering any selective revert.
followUps: 如需支持用户级别的菜单顺序偏好，可在 settings 子菜单里补一个作用域选择流程，并保持当前 workspace seam 兼容。
如需扩展到二级或更深层菜单排序，应单独设计配置结构，避免与现有 rootMenuOrder 语义混淆。
